text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Plan Characteristics Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 1.7 308 

SNP_PERCENTAGE_TYPE 

LABEL: Special Needs Plan (SNP) Percentage Type 

DESCRIPTION: This variable describes the special needs plan (SNP) percentage type for applicable plan benefit 
packages. 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS files) 

VALUES: 1 = Exclusive 

COMMENT: The CCW constructs the plan characteristics file from information submitted by plan sponsors
